h3b32aebegd34fg4f4bg9ff0g2cf1c166c257: There's promise in patience, I assure you. Let the night run its course so that we can run ours as well.
hd8d65948geb96g4d2bg858dgb6a103b6c353: I've said enough. Let silence do the talking.
h8bdbe62agb2e0g49a3gaca1g6eb1ecdb51eb: Enjoy the night. It seems to me full of opportunities.
h119423eagf961g4bf4gb5b8g7532987afa21: I thank you for seeking me out. Amid all this merriment I wasn't sure we'd have a chance to speak this evening.
hafbe086eg3a7fg4b51gabe2g14d137d1a7ee: I wasn't sure we'd have a chance to make merry, just the two of us.
h65cedf33gf470g42f6gbf9bg7d28a7095d5b: I think that's the wine talking.
h40e4bc11g5407g479fg8c14ge2b1163a5c6f: As they say in Waterdeep: In wine there is truth.
h3c3a6f9fge5c6g436eg841cg3db73b9c9522: That's usually followed by: In water there is good sense.
h46377955gde5fg4065gb2c7g031e2fdea0fc: Good sense will have to wait till the morrow.
he88d941cgb7d3g4818g8a18g2167ca24e4d6: Make merry, just the two of us. What would that entail?
h9a600134g294ag4f5agba54g79c12f663d7b: That, my friend, must remain a secret. For now. Or rather: for as long as you've eyes only for someone else among our troupe.
h44825ee8gfc63g4f81g9266g24fe56c733b0: I know there are many things about me that remain shrouded in mystery. You've been very patient with me, and I appreciate that.
h50996b3fg57e7g46d4g8dafge7673de458f7: You've given me powerful magic to consume when I needed it most.
he0d06c20g90ddg489cg91d1g10e43642475e: You've brought me back from the grey shores of death.
h63491773g723bg4bd7gbb9eg803c934c34f5: You know of my condition, and you know about my unfortunate efforts to win Mystra's favour, but those are but the broad strokes.
h50707379g1436g49deg84c4g3237da3ad581: The time has come to paint you the true picture.
h36a9a09dg0b70g46bfg9934gf0e98be465c0: I have to admit I'm curious.
h397a452eg5bb5g4238ga5d8g0cb12a96c8e8: I can only hope my tale will live up to your expectations.
h396ce6feg32b5g40f4gb6d1g1d1f077dff52: Tonight, of course, we celebrate, and I won't keep you any longer. Tomorrow night though, you're in for quite the bedtime story.
hd12ae151g628fg4f44g8baage1aedd01a71e: I've waited long enough, haven't I?
h5d460b3cgdcbbg4357g8e00g4bf762fec341: What makes you think I still care?
he55ffb37gfa83g406cgae9agbb79d3b0ccfb: Curiosity is a trait we all share.
hfeb4ef1agda95g47fega4bcgb98628f244ec: You know of my condition and its challenges, but those are but the broad strokes.
he1f38580g50b8g437cgabd2gcd67d3869a11: I was given powerful magic to consume when I needed it most.
h44e3b30ag1bd7g4066gacdcg3caae12a64e4: Actually, on second thought I can't think of it entailing anything particularly enticing at all.
h65561494g4f4bg4e7bga9a6g966feb47cfad: Forgive me, I seem to be of two minds and two moods. We'll blame the wine and leave it at that.
h46bdf95dgaa6cg4cd8gb18fgb2b2d68893e3: We shared a romantic moment of the mind while cloaked in the Weave, didn't we?
h8f512020g5c38g4c24g8598gb7be8bc8b636: And I seem to recall a fond allusion to that moment afterwards.
hbf9f421cg2796g459fg84efg2ef1dc8250cf: Allow me to make the following proposition:
h90068ce0gad23g4811g835dg52596d8540fe: There's a book that circulates in Amn, detailing the first thousand nights of a newlywed king and queen.
h4fe66ee3gd958g4140gb344gcea262aa713c: They turned everything they did into an art. The art of conversation. The art of taste, time honoured and newly acquired.
hbd19f3e9ga698g421dgb6dag98c086dcf312: The art of the body. The exploration and acceptance of the self and the other. The art of the night itself.
h89898879g6732g45fegae3cgf2bc65a25d4e: I say we take a page from their book.
h2f304415g08bcg4f5fgb9b8g7ea15049148f: Leave it to you to woo someone with a book.
h0290778fgaf7ag41baga308gaf14135c6473: Forget the book then. Let's be blank slates on blank sheets, delightfully new.
h77e993e1g6836g437agbc3fgc5e072719c39: That's because I'm full of delights.
h5cc7af70gb8f5g45b0g961egbd1380ab338a: We'll let the night run its course. And when everything is quieting down, safe in the arms of sleep, I'll come by to find safety in yours.
h52cdad0ag57b7g4dd8g98e9g58cac658f8f4: I'm afraid I have to decline.
h87d73e5cg1a77g4c88g8dc3gd05261287b7c: Too bad. One should never be afraid to live life to the fullest.
h5fc2301dgf000g4c5dga3d9g5039f9ca27f5: I'm not sure you're the one I want.
h3d394528g83d0g4ec7ga741g292bd82b6456: That's because you've yet to find out what you're missing.
h261c3709g3f5ag469agb770g5424b2e4da4d: Doubt is a spoilsport. Cast it aside.
h5aad2cc6gb81fg4455g8825g07f7386f6da5: You're right. I'd like to spend the night with you.
h6e3c1061gb8b3g4e51ga099g93a7fba3813e: A match made... not quite in heaven, but close enough.
h1d9d15bcgb407g4295ga16fgbe21ace6ec97: You're remarkably upfront about your intentions.
h24f5e2f3g13a9g494fgb7c4gdbb0921756f0: I'm many things, but coy's not one of them.
h83c593ceg6316g4f0fga838g32b72cdce542: I'll remind you we're newly acquainted, not newlyweds.
h60e3396eg6ae7g40f3gaabcg7361216f2c19: Then we'll start writing the prequel.
ha97df8d1g1d1ag41f5gb232g27940456c40d: Let me stop you right there. That's not something I'm interested in.
h96d13dd5g344eg4b95ga9f6g8b9adc1932e7: Perhaps that's a moment we ought to further explore.
h175e84c2gb0bcg4a77gbbdbgd74578b5b71c: We had a moment, you and I, a moment in which we expressed the possibility of becoming more than friends.
h3331caa7g353cg4f5fga134g3996780530c2: Tonight seems perfectly suited for such endeavours.
hed59fd76g759bg4d68g9582g7f16956a4d29: Merely to share a glass of wine I suppose; to toast to victory and to offer you an invitation.
hb85b42d1gb327g4adcgbce6g1136e1523e3e: Actually I think I'll go mix and mingle.
h2e4c5b5dg7091g4919g837ag9f513ded5731: More's the pity you've already found someone else to make merry with, just the two of you.
h109a1b01g7146g4844gb4d9g31ea21f7337d: He has a certain charm about him, Astarion. Then again, so does a tiger when it purrs.
he878f97eg9a5eg43f6ga79cg2bca7f87eef6: Far be it from me of course, to question your tastes.
h952ef47eg6601g4f5ega41dgb919c24d89b0: And yet you question them nonetheless.
hd3c75631g9803g4136g9713gd8eec2321e49: Caught on to that, did you? Might be the wine talking.
h5d9b08bag07c5g46deg9f66gd94e256a41a7: Do I detect a hint of jealousy?
hf2e09efcge49ag4378ga1feg296fec26c833: Jealousy is in the eye of the beholder. Or something along those lines, the wine might be befuddling me a smidge.
h922707d3gfe37g4fdeg8f40g280484a71922: Didn't peg you for a sore loser, Gale.
h60cb146dg93cag414dga205g7f3b296e21f6: Am I? Perhaps I am. Or perhaps I need another glass of wine.
hb3869d3fgfacbg4aa1g9834g094ce36976e0: Actually, I may just want to spend the night with you instead of Astarion.
hd01194abgf660g4e37g9d13g9823246def46: You're all too quick to abandon the one you promised yourself to. That is not a quality I admire.
h886f8fb6g3c78g42e2gaab9g8f24b11a1569: No, I was glad you sought me out for an entirely different reason:
h346b4f5agbf92g4820g945ege67375be51be: I'm sorry, but surely we're friends, allies, the best of companions, but... no more than that.
h527fbb5bg81e0g4506ga2d4g355fe75e5156: No, I was glad you sought me out for an entirely different reason: to toast to victory and to offer you an invitation.
hdf451724gb195g4e5agbbc6g1b902c0d7a8c: Actually, I may just want to spend the night with you instead of Karlach.
hc9dfcbeeg48f2g45cagbf1eg861c5dc6feb9: Actually, I may just want to spend the night with you instead of Lae'zel.
h71134a9fg9b63g4368g94cagddbc2bcf1f0b: Actually, I may just want to spend the night with you instead of Shadowheart.
h6849ea79ge0dag455fg9413g237084abc844: Actually, I may just want to spend the night with you instead of Wyll.
h268b7e25g1ec6g4a63g82faga1977fff351d: You might be in for an adventure with Karlach. More than you bargained for - with a bit of luck.
h92b3c96eg7e9bg4d7bgb3e5g6a7794616c68: Or perhaps more than you bargained for - full stop.
h94a3a5d0gaf7fg4cccg826ag66b4056ad3b9: Lae'zel. Blade like a razor, wit like a razor, tongue like a razor.
ha3100111gd0a6g4fdcg9780g5baaed4d51c4: I do hope you know what you're doing.
hc7ed5bd2ge96cg4edbga016g7888cd301f06: There's something... unspeakable about Shadowheart. But I mean that in a good way. She seems to me like a bud on the cusp of bursting into a rose.
h547e03e1gd3dcg4308g97fbg1bd99b5cefc5: Wyll's a good man. He may actually be a tried-and-true storybook hero.
h6c08413dg05a6g454eg9361gc3e8e0d8b6f6: Then again he's so full of himself it's a small miracle he hasn't resorted to self-cannibalism yet.
h2dd3a6c0gab82g47b4gbabdgfd4fd4d065d8: I'm glad you sought me out. Amid all this merriment I wasn't sure we'd have a chance to speak this evening.
hc955f29fgb699g462dgb5f6gb031d9687a78: Come now! This is a night for celebration, not suspicion.
